race.description: Real Punters Play Here Tabtouch Mdn
race.comment: LEG GODT (8) disappointed at Northam last time out over 1300m but was building nicely prior to that. Back to 1200m today won't be an issue and she should be able to find the front again. Can bounce back to her best and give them something to chase. EIGHTYSEVEN LAD (1) showed promising signs in his debut campaign and looks to be in good order coming into this, winning a recent trial under Faithfull. She remains in the irons and he'll be very hard to hold out if he can pick up from where he left off. LETS TAKE A CHANCE (3) comes here on debut after a few handy trials in readiness. He'll be fit with three trials under his belt coming into this and Azzopardi has options from the barrier. Wouldn't be surprised to see him make a statement. SOPHIA'S KISS (11) looks to have raised the bar since joining the new stable and can't be discounted first-up. MAURICE'S PRINCESS (6) is next best.
